goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 08:00' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should go to 'birmingham new street' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'alexander bed and breakfast'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 08:00 and should leave on sunday
The train should go to birmingham new street and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called alexander bed and breakfast
Make sure you get address and postcode
